name: boyko-method
description: Evidence-labeled decomposition of complex systems (≥3 components): Atomize → Lenses → Confidence-labeled dependency map (VERIFIED/INFERRED/WEAK/РАЗОРВАНА) → Assemble → Falsify. Orchestrates /multi-lens, /skeptic, falsification-ladder, /estimand-ops. Use for architecture, scientific claims, production bugs, regulatory workflows, anti-fraud.
